from __future__ import annotations


def same_precondition_checked_in_multiple_sibling_branches_positive(user: dict[str, str] | None, mode: str) -> str:
    if mode == "brief":
        if user is None:
            raise ValueError("user required")
        return user["name"]
    if mode == "full":
        if user is None:
            raise ValueError("user required")
        return f"{user['name']}<{user['email']}>"
    return "unknown"
